input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.8.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.8.4.2
            TITLE: the custom impact attenuator must meet the following:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.8.4.2: The Custom Impact Attenuator must meet the following:
F.8.4.2 The Custom Impact Attenuator must meet the following:  
a. Length 200 mm or more, with its length oriented along the fore/aft axis of the Chassis.  
b. Minimum height 100 mm (perpendicular to the ground) and minimum width 200 mm 
(parallel to the ground) for a minimum distance of 200 mm forward of the Front 
Bulkhead.  
c. Segmented foam attenuators must have all segments bonded together to prevent sliding 
or parallelogramming. 
d. Honeycomb attenuators made of multiple segments must have a continuous panel 
between each segment.

final_answer: The Custom Impact Attenuator must meet the following: F.8.4.2 The Custom Impact Attenuator must meet the following: a. Length 200 mm or more, with its length oriented along the fore/aft axis of the Chassis. b. Minimum height 100 mm (perpendicular to the ground) and minimum width 200 mm (parallel to the ground) for a minimum distance of 200 mm forward of the Front Bulkhead. c. Segmented foam attenuators must have all segments bonded together to prevent sliding or parallelogramming. d. Honeycomb attenuators made of multiple segments must have a continuous panel between each segment.
